name: Thread-first hourly task judgment
purpose: Make hourly LINE judgment reconcile conversation event threads before creating or updating tasks.
coreQuestion: Does this message update an existing event-level task, or does it create a genuinely new event that needs its own task?
requiredInputs: new LINE messages since previous run

decisionFlow.name: Group by conversation
decisionFlow.rule: Judge messages inside their LINE group, room, or user conversation instead of as isolated messages.

decisionFlow.name: Load context
decisionFlow.rule: Read nearby earlier messages from the same conversation before judging the current message.

decisionFlow.name: Infer project
decisionFlow.rule: Use conversation master project assignment first. If it is blank, infer from conversation name, preview, and context before generic text rules.

decisionFlow.name: Suppress non-task records
decisionFlow.rule: Assistant commands, setup messages, acknowledgements, contact exchange, and background records must not create total-control tasks unless they contain a separate concrete action.

decisionFlow.name: Apply project calibration
decisionFlow.rule: When a known project topic pattern exists, use its contextual matching rules before generic keyword matching.

decisionFlow.name: Search active tasks
decisionFlow.rule: Search active total-control tasks before creating a new task. Exclude archived, completed, cancelled, and deprecated tasks.

decisionFlow.name: Update before create
decisionFlow.rule: If the message extends, answers, blocks, completes, changes, or clarifies an active task, update that task and record evidence.

decisionFlow.name: Create event task
decisionFlow.rule: Create a new task only when no active task can absorb the event and the event contains a real action, owner, delivery, decision, risk, or follow-up need.

decisionFlow.name: Merge same-run duplicates
decisionFlow.rule: If multiple messages in the same run produce the same candidate task, create it once and update it for later messages.

suppressionSignals: duplicate file link without new action

projectCalibrationExamples.description: A vendor estimate thread may include contact exchange, document links, and later missing-document questions.
projectCalibrationExamples.progressUpdate: Design drawings or file links sent to vendor update the existing estimate-delivery task.
projectCalibrationExamples.newOrUpdatedTask: Missing documents such as site location map, permits, or drawings become one consolidated follow-up task.

evidenceRequired: reason for updating or creating task
